---
name: obligatory_ai_generation_comment_guideline
description: Enforce the exact AI generation comment on each newly created file and newly created class.
---

# Obligatory Skill: AI Generation Comment Guideline

When creating any new file or new class, include this exact text:

`generated by AI in Github cloud`

## Rules

- Add the exact comment near the top of every newly created file.
- Add the exact comment in or directly above every newly created class.
- Keep the text exactly unchanged for consistency and auditability.
